inputs.label: Asset Cost
inputs.businessContext: Initial purchase cost of the asset

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value at the end of useful life

inputs.label: Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the asset in years

inputs.label: Declining Rate Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for the straight-line rate (e.g., 2 for double declining balance)

inputs.label: Year
inputs.businessContext: Year for which to compute depreciation (1 to useful life)

formulas.depreciationAmount: year > usefulLife ? 0 : (() => { const rate = (1 / usefulLife) * rateMultiplier; const bvStart = Math.max(cost * Math.pow(1 - rate, year - 1), salvage); return bvStart === salvage ? 0 : Math.min(rate * bvStart, bvStart - salvage); })()
formulas.bookValueStart: year > usefulLife ? salvage : Math.max(cost * Math.pow(1 - (1 / usefulLife) * rateMultiplier, year - 1), salvage)
formulas.accumulatedDepreciation: year > usefulLife ? cost - salvage : cost - Math.max(cost * Math.pow(1 - (1 / usefulLife) * rateMultiplier, year), salvage)
formulas.bookValueEnd: year > usefulLife ? salvage : Math.max(cost * Math.pow(1 - (1 / usefulLife) * rateMultiplier, year), salvage)
